brief_summary: Three Prussian-red watch cards naming the close-week signals. Card 1: single SKU vs. split fulfillment (single = tighter allocation, earlier close). Card 2: modifier-kit count (3 or fewer = tight pricing, sprawl = restock discounts). Card 3: deskmat and novelty handling (in-base or future round, signals run shape). Caption asks whether GMK CYL sustains a second strong year.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-prussian-alert.mdx § 'What we're watching' — 'whether KBDfans posts a single global SKU or splits regional fulfillment — a single SKU usually means tighter allocation and an earlier close ... the modifier-kit count. CYL sets that ship with three or fewer kits tend to keep their pricing tight; sprawl correlates with deeper discounts at restock ... whether the deskmat and novelty kits run as add-ons to the base, or get held back'
